title: Canonicalize the continuity read order with structured state first
approval_evidence: Apruebo DEC-LAB-007 y DEC-LAB-008. Autorizo aplicar, validar, hacer commit y push en main, limitado al fileset definido.

decision.summary: The canonical continuity protocol must read CURRENT_STATE.json before CURRENT_STATE.md so that structured state is consulted before its human-readable view.
rules: The mandatory read order is LAB_CONTRACT.md, METHODOLOGY.md, CURRENT_STATE.json, CURRENT_STATE.md, registry/projects.json, active project state, decisions in force, open errors, and applicable patterns.
CURRENT_STATE.json remains the structured source of truth.
CURRENT_STATE.md remains the human-readable view and must stay materially consistent with the JSON state.
LAB_CONTRACT.md, METHODOLOGY.md, README.md, CURRENT_STATE.json, and CURRENT_STATE.md must not prescribe contradictory continuity orders.
This decision corrects documentary inconsistency only and does not authorize product execution, runtime work, migration, release, integration, deployment, or changes outside the LAB repository.
